problem id: 71a661f7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  10110010 -> 01101100
  00001011 -> 01100010
  11011011 -> 01010110
  00011001 -> 00100110
  11010101 -> 10010101
  10100110 -> 11101001
  10011011 -> 01000110
  01010101 -> 10110101
  01011010 -> 01010110

query: 10000111
predicted answer: 11000001
